Machine Learning Engineer

Responsibilities

  • Build and deploy machine learning models in production.
  • Collaborate with product and engineering teams.
  • Improve model reliability with monitoring, testing, and CI/CD.
  • Conduct experiments and communicate insights to stakeholders.

Qualifications

  • Strong Python and SQL skills.
  • Experience with NLP, PyTorch, and AWS.
  • MLOps mindset and ownership of model lifecycle.
